CVE-2017-9778.title: GNU Debugger (GDB) 8.0 and earlier fails to detect a negative len ...
CVE-2017-9778.summary: GNU Debugger (GDB) 8.0 and earlier fails to detect a negative length field in a DWARF section. A malformed section in an ELF binary or a core file can cause GDB to repeatedly allocate memory until a process limit is reached. This can, for example, impede efforts to analyze malware with GDB.

CVE-2022-4285.title: An illegal memory access flaw was found in the binutils package.  ...
CVE-2022-4285.summary: An illegal memory access flaw was found in the binutils package. Parsing an ELF file containing corrupt symbol version information may result in a denial of service. This issue is the result of an incomplete fix for CVE-2020-16599.

CVE-2023-1972.title: A potential heap based buffer overflow was found in _bfd_elf_slur ...
CVE-2023-1972.summary: A potential heap based buffer overflow was found in _bfd_elf_slurp_version_tables() in bfd/elf.c. This may lead to loss of availability.

CVE-2023-39128.title: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a st ...
CVE-2023-39128.summary: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a stack overflow via the function ada_decode at /gdb/ada-lang.c.

CVE-2023-39129.title: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a he ...
CVE-2023-39129.summary: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a heap use after free via the function add_pe_exported_sym() at /gdb/coff-pe-read.c.

CVE-2023-39130.title: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a he ...
CVE-2023-39130.summary: GNU gdb (GDB) 13.0.50.20220805-git was discovered to contain a heap buffer overflow via the function pe_as16() at /gdb/coff-pe-read.c.

CVE-2024-36699.title: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CVE RECORD. ConsultIDs: none. Re ...
CVE-2024-36699.summary: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CVE RECORD. ConsultIDs: none. Reason: This record was withdrawn by its CNA. Further investigation showed that it was not a security issue. Notes: none.

CVE-2021-3530.title: A flaw was discovered in GNU libiberty within demangle_path() in  ...
CVE-2021-3530.summary: A flaw was discovered in GNU libiberty within demangle_path() in rust-demangle.c, as distributed in GNU Binutils version 2.36. A crafted symbol can cause stack memory to be exhausted leading to a crash.

CVE-2021-3826.title: Heap/stack buffer overflow in the dlang_lname function in d-deman ...
CVE-2021-3826.summary: Heap/stack buffer overflow in the dlang_lname function in d-demangle.c in libiberty allows attackers to potentially cause a denial of service (segmentation fault and crash) via a crafted mangled symbol.

CVE-2022-27943.title: libiberty/rust-demangle.c in GNU GCC 11.2 allows stack consumptio ...
CVE-2022-27943.summary: libiberty/rust-demangle.c in GNU GCC 11.2 allows stack consumption in demangle_const, as demonstrated by nm-new.
